locations.description_en: The path leading into the village. A wooden sign marks the way.
A cozy house where jan Pona lives.
A small well-house where jan Telo tends the water.
A small garden at the edge of the village. Fruits grow here.
The road back toward the wider world, beyond the village.

npcs.role_en: Quest Giver — a kind villager who is hungry
npcs.personality_en: Warm and friendly; always smiling, speaks simply and slowly.

greeting.tp: toki! mi jan Pona. soweli mi li pilin ike.
greeting.en: Hello! I'm jan Pona. My animal friend is feeling sick.

npcs.personality_en: Quiet and observant; notices everything, gives a small hint.

greeting.tp: toki, soweli. ma kasi li jo e kili.
greeting.en: Hello, animal friend. The garden has fruit.

npcs.role_en: Ambient NPC — a sleepy elder resting near the path
npcs.personality_en: Drowsy and peaceful; barely notices you, speaks a single dreamy line.

greeting.tp: a... mi wile lape. ma tomo li pona.
greeting.en: Ah... I want to sleep. The village is good.

narration.tp: sina soweli lili. sina tawa ma tomo lili. jan li awen lon ni.
narration.en: You are a small animal. You walk into a small village. People live here.

narration.tp: a! kili li lon ma kasi. kili li pona.
narration.en: Oh! Fruit is in the garden. The fruit is good.

quest.title_tp: jan Pona li wile e moku

dictionary_entry.definition_en: fruit, vegetable, mushroom; any plant-based food

dialog.tp: toki! soweli mi li pilin ike. ona li wile e kili.
dialog.en: Hello! My animal friend feels sick. It needs fruit.

dialog.tp: kili li lon ma kasi. taso akesi li lon ma kasi. o awen.
dialog.en: The fruit is in the garden. But a reptile is there too. Be careful.

dialog.tp: sina lukin e soweli pi jan Pona? ona li lete. telo li pona tawa ona.
dialog.en: Have you seen jan Pona's animal? It is cold. Water would help.

dialog.tp: a... jan Pona li wile e moku. ona li sona e ni.
dialog.en: Ah... jan Pona wants food. She knows this.

dialog.tp: kili lili li lon ni. ona li pona tawa soweli.
dialog.en: A small fruit is here. This will help the animal.

dialog.tp: a! kili! soweli mi li moku e ni. ona li kama pona. sina pona a!
dialog.en: Oh, fruit! My animal will eat this. It will get better. You are so kind!

dialog.tp: sina pali pona. sina sona e kili.
dialog.en: You did well. You now know: kili.
